case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SAFI, SAMI (C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFI, SAMI (C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES) DISMISSAL IS AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,729.80 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SAFI, SAMI (C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFI, SAMI (C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFI, SAMI (C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES) $4,729.80 PRINCIPAL, $50.84 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,780.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFI, SAMI (C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES) HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-23-2001, GRANTED
